project_type: Python Streamlit web application - AI text humanizer
test_framework: None currently - will add basic validation
test_command: python -c "import app; print('Import OK')" || streamlit run app.py --server.headless true &
verification_instructions: 1. Install requirements: pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. Verify imports work: python -c 'from humanizer import pipeline; print("OK")'. 3. Run streamlit app in headless mode to check for startup errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Python 3.11 via pyenv. API endpoint: https://api.freemodel.dev (OpenAI-compatible). API key placeholder: 'insert your api key here'.
contribution_requirements: Keep as Streamlit app runnable with 'streamlit run app.py'. Maintain academic tone. Preserve scientific accuracy. Keep API endpoint as freemodel.dev.
key_patterns: Current app is single-file (app.py) with inline CSS styling, streaming API calls to OpenAI-compatible endpoint, textstat for readability metrics. Uses st.write_stream for live output. Dark theme configured in .streamlit/config.toml.
directory_structure: Root level: app.py (main entry), requirements.txt (deps), README.md (docs), .streamlit/config.toml (theme config). Will be restructured into modular architecture with humanizer/ package.
